title: Recruit guard villagers
description: You can now hire guards from guard villagers mod(fabric and forge)
body:
# Updated, i just noticed 125 downloads:D

**This datapack requires [Guard villager mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers-(fabricquilt)), also if you want villagers to be able to follow you with this datapack, disable followHero option in config of the mod**

## Recruit a villager
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Suk-AYGICas" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
You can now pay an emerald to the guard and change it's armor/weaponary, make him defend you.

This is a very simple datapack, you can modify it if you want,
It has README.md in it, that explains how it works and what should/will be changed for better expirience

Thanks for using it
